example_only_or_benchmark_scope_note: OPT-03 qualitative benchmark for this repository and recent local workflow only; not universal metrics.

benchmark_cases.name: Course environment restore / host readiness
manual_workflow_observations: Host Check versus bootstrap READY distinction
collector_assisted_observations: command results and artifacts can be grouped in one review packet
stdout and stderr paths make raw output easier to locate
empty stderr artifacts and hashes reduce ambiguity
human review remains required for host readiness interpretation

benchmark_cases.name: RV2-03 final acceptance
manual_workflow_observations: Host readiness blocker needed multiple follow-ups
sandbox GitHub or Codex context created false blocker risk
final manifest/input source had to be traced
collector_assisted_observations: read-only command outputs can be captured in command result records
failed command records would preserve exit code and artifact paths
semantic acceptance remains outside collector authority

benchmark_cases.name: OPT-02 implementation review
manual_workflow_observations: untracked files did not show in normal git diff
raw diff retrieval required extra follow-up
tests and CLI smoke evidence were separate from code review
collector_assisted_observations: test and JSON validation output can be grouped in one review packet
command result records preserve argv, cwd, exit code, timing, and artifact paths
untracked-file raw diff still requires explicit no-index handling

manual_workflow_observations.summary: Manual evidence collection worked but repeated starting-state, validation, raw output, and final-report material across tasks.
main_costs: extra follow-up for raw untracked diffs

limitations: collector does not decide semantic acceptance
collector does not replace raw diff review
src-layout local execution requires process-local PYTHONPATH=src

conditions: no semantic acceptance delegation to the collector
